name: Model Router
description: Routes simple prompts to a cheap model and escalates complex prompts to stronger models.

enabled.label: Enable Router
enabled.help: Turn model routing on/off without removing the plugin.

simpleModel.label: Simple Model
simpleModel.help: Cheap default model for short/simple prompts.

veryComplexModel.label: Very Complex Model
veryComplexModel.help: Strongest model for deep reasoning or long prompts.

complexChars.label: Complex Threshold (chars)
complexChars.help: Prompt length above this value triggers the complex model.

veryComplexChars.label: Very Complex Threshold (chars)
veryComplexChars.help: Prompt length above this value triggers the strongest model.
